tracks.meaning: a certificate of debt issued by a government or corporation promising to repay borrowed money with interest at a fixed time
a force or connection holding atoms or molecules together in a chemical compound
to join or connect things together firmly
a legal agreement or covenant between two or more parties
a close emotional or social connection between people
the physical act of jumping or leaping, especially in gymnastics or acrobatics
a close tactical arrangement of soldiers or ships for mutual protection
a band of tough connective tissue joining bones or holding organs in place
a financial or legal restriction placed on a person or entity as punishment
